title: adesmia microphylla
intro: Adesmia microphylla, also known as Puna, is a shrub-like plant native to South America, particularly in the Andean region. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Adesmia microphylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and even help manage blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
